policy.continuous_execution: report is not a final stop; continue through task_self_assignment
policy.done_rule: DONE only with non-null SHA + artifacts + receipts + release PASS + external audit
policy.release_pass: blocked until RM15/RM16/RM17 receipts + RM18 PASS + external audit

last_actions.action: rewrote release repair gate as one autonomous Python loop
last_actions.reason: multi-step workflow could skip commit when a repair step failed; new loop always writes diagnostics and commit step always runs

next_task.action: check receipts and diagnostics; if release PASS is absent, repair exact workflow/runner error and redispatch without operator pause
